name: Expert Cash Advance Quick Payday Loans
description_short: Florida-licensed short-term lender offering single-payment loans up to $500 and installment loans up to $1,000 through in-person branch locations only.
description_long:
Expert Cash Advance operates as a Florida-regulated short-term lender holding license #FLPL-90273. The company specializes in providing regulated financial assistance to consumers needing emergency cash through physical branch locations. Their business model focuses exclusively on in-person applications and service delivery, with branches referenced in multiple locations including Corpus Christi, Texas.

The company offers two primary loan products. Single-payment transactions provide up to $500 with 7–31 day terms and fees up to 10% plus a verification fee (commonly $5). Installment transactions offer up to $1,000 with 60–90 day terms and biweekly fees up to 8% of the outstanding balance, plus separate verification fees permitted by law. All terms and conditions are disclosed before signing, and the company emphasizes transparency in its fee structure.

Expert Cash Advance distinguishes itself through explicit Florida regulatory compliance and a commitment to clear disclosure of all fees before loan execution. The company highlights its licensed status prominently and states that all terms are explained clearly during the in-person application process. Their four-step process (visit branch, bring documents, review terms, receive funds) positions accessibility and straightforwardness as core operational values.

As a short-term lender, Expert Cash Advance serves consumers facing immediate financial needs who can visit a physical location and provide valid ID and proof of income. However, the in-person-only model limits accessibility for those unable to visit branches, and the fee structure—while compliant with Florida law—results in effective annual percentage rates that are substantially higher than traditional personal loans. Consumers should carefully review terms before committing, as short-term loans carry significant costs relative to borrowed amounts.
pros: Florida-licensed and regulated under license #FLPL-90273, ensuring legal compliance and consumer protections
Clear fee disclosure before signing—all terms and total repayment amounts provided upfront
Fast funding available if approved, addressing genuine emergency cash needs
Multiple branch locations for in-person service and document verification
Flexible loan amounts ($500 single-payment, $1,000 installment) and term options (7–90 days)
Transparent fee structure with specific maximums: 10% for single-payment, 8% biweekly for installments
Simple four-step application process requiring only valid ID and proof of income
cons: In-person application only—no online application available, limiting accessibility for customers unable to visit branches
High effective APR despite compliant fee structure; 10% on a 7-day loan equals ~520% annualized
Maximum loan amounts ($500–$1,000) insufficient for larger emergency expenses or debt consolidation
Short repayment terms (7–31 days for single-payment) create repayment burden and rollover risk for financially vulnerable consumers
best_for: Consumers with immediate emergency cash needs ($300–$1,000) who can visit a physical branch location
Individuals unable to qualify for traditional bank loans but who have stable income and valid ID
Borrowers comfortable with higher-cost short-term lending who prioritize speed and regulatory oversight
diagnosis: Expert Cash Advance is best for consumers with immediate emergency cash needs ($300–$1,000) who can visit a physical branch and have valid income documentation. The primary caveat is the in-person-only model and the high effective annual cost of short-term borrowing, despite regulatory compliance and transparent fee disclosure. Borrowers should explore alternatives (credit unions, CDFIs, payday alternative loans) before committing to these loans.
services: Single-payment short-term loans up to $500 (7–31 day terms)
Installment loans up to $1,000 (60–90 day terms)
In-person loan applications at branch locations
Clear term disclosure and review before loan execution
Same-day or next-day funding upon approval
Florida-regulated lending in compliance with state law
